pairs.subject: Important Update on Employee Benefits
pairs.desc:
Dear Team,

We are excited to announce some important updates to our employee benefits program. These changes will take effect from next month and are designed to provide you with better health coverage and additional perks.

Please find the attached document that outlines the new benefits in detail. We encourage you to review it and reach out with any questions.

Best regards,

HR Team
pairs.explain: This email is from the HR department and contains a legitimate attachment regarding employee benefits.

pairs.subject: Urgent: Update Your Benefits Information
pairs.desc:
Dear Employee,

We have detected an issue with your benefits information. To ensure you continue receiving your benefits without interruption, please update your information immediately by clicking the link below.

Also, please find the attached file that you need to run to complete the update process.

Thank you,
HR Department
pairs.explain: This email is attempting to trick the employee into running a malicious executable file under the guise of updating benefits.

pairs.subject: Quarterly Financial Report
pairs.desc:
Hello Team,

Attached is the quarterly financial report for Q3. Please review the document carefully and prepare any questions you may have for our upcoming meeting.

Your insights are valuable as we discuss our financial strategy moving forward.

Best,
Finance Team
pairs.explain: This email is from the Finance department and contains a legitimate PDF attachment of the financial report.

pairs.subject: Immediate Action Required: Financial Report
pairs.desc:
Dear Employee,

We have attached a financial report that requires your immediate attention. Please download and run the attached file to access the report.

Failure to do so may result in compliance issues.

Regards,
Finance Department
pairs.explain: This email is trying to deceive the employee into running a harmful batch file disguised as a financial report.

pairs.subject: IT Security Awareness Training
pairs.desc:
Dear Team,

As part of our ongoing commitment to cybersecurity, we are conducting a mandatory IT security awareness training. Attached is the training material that you must review before the scheduled session.

Please ensure you complete this by the end of the week.

Thank you,
IT Security Team
pairs.explain: This email is from the IT Security department and contains a legitimate PDF attachment for training.

pairs.subject: Urgent: Security Training Required
pairs.desc:
Hello,

We have identified a critical security vulnerability that requires your immediate attention. Please download and execute the attached file to complete the necessary training.

Failure to comply may result in disciplinary action.

Best,
IT Security
pairs.explain: This email tries to trick the employee into executing a malicious file disguised as training material.

pairs.subject: Travel Itinerary Confirmation
pairs.desc:
Dear Employee,

Your travel itinerary for the upcoming business trip has been confirmed. Please find the attached document with all the details.

If you have any questions or need to make changes, feel free to reach out.

Safe travels,
Travel Department
pairs.explain: This email is from the Travel department and includes a legitimate PDF attachment of the travel itinerary.

pairs.subject: Action Required: Travel Itinerary Update
pairs.desc:
Dear Team,

There has been a last-minute change to your travel itinerary. Please download and run the attached file to view the updated details.

It is crucial that you do this as soon as possible to avoid any issues.

Thank you,
Travel Team
pairs.explain: This email attempts to deceive the employee into running a harmful executable file under the pretense of updating travel information.

pairs.subject: Legal Document Review
pairs.desc:
Hi,

Please find attached the legal documents that require your review. We need your feedback by the end of the week to proceed with the negotiations.

Let me know if you have any questions.

Best,
Legal Team
pairs.explain: This email is from the Legal department and contains a legitimate PDF attachment for document review.

pairs.subject: Immediate Review Needed: Legal Document
pairs.desc:
Dear Employee,

We have attached a legal document that requires your immediate review. Please download and execute the attached file to access the document.

Your prompt action is necessary to avoid delays.

Regards,
Legal Department
pairs.explain: This email is trying to trick the employee into executing a harmful screen saver file disguised as a legal document.
